productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boy I Like to be Naughty Green Tshirt
description: Composition Green T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, and graphic and rubber print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print Watch your little one's eyes sparkle with the naughtiness that his favourite cartoon character has in this T-shirt from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. Dress him in this T-shirt and watch him play up to his tricks in style. Crafted from pure and environmentally safe cotton, this tee offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers or shorts.
